title: Deterministic Encounter Query by Traits
description: Upon triggering Encounter Generation, the system shall read the Scene's traits and inherited World Event traits, and deterministically query the monster/hazard database. If no exact match is found, the system shall broaden the search to find the closest match and notify the GM.
acceptance_criteria: System successfully queries the database using combined traits.
If an exact match is missing, the system falls back to a broader search and notifies the user.
